oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Seattle Parrot Expo
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Aviculture, American Federation of
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 3 (July 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Reserve, and for the first time, a second generation chick fledged from the nest boxes.Due in part to the results from the nest box project, current estimates of population size have risen with expectations of continued growth. In 2015,Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 3 (2023): Watchbird July 2023; 21
